What are your shipping hours?: We process and ship orders Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM EST.
Do you ship internationally?: Yes, we ship to over 100 countries. International shipping usually takes 7-14 business days.
How can I return a book?: You can return any unread book within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. Please use the return label included in your package.
How long does domestic delivery take?: Standard domestic delivery takes 3-5 business days. Expedited shipping takes 1-2 business days.
What payment methods do you accept?: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, PayPal, and Apple Pay.
Can I track my order?: Yes! Once your order ships, we will email you a tracking number so you can follow its journey.
Do you sell e-books or audiobooks?: Currently, we specialize in physical paperback and hardcover books. We plan to introduce digital formats next year.
Can I cancel my order?: You can cancel your order within 2 hours of placing it by visiting your Account dashboard. After 2 hours, the order is sent to our warehouse for processing.
What happens if my book arrives damaged?: We are so sorry! Please email a photo of the damaged book to support@bookstore.com within 7 days, and we will ship a replacement immediately.
Do you offer gift wrapping?: Yes, gift wrapping is available at checkout for an additional $4.99 per item.
How do I apply a discount code?: You can enter your discount code in the 'Promo Code' box during the checkout process before adding your payment information.
Are out of stock books restocked?: Most of our popular titles are restocked within 2-3 weeks. You can click 'Notify Me' on the product page to get an email when it returns.
Do you offer bulk discounts for schools: Yes! We offer a 15% discount for orders of 20 or more copies of the same title. Please contact our bulk sales team.
How can I contact customer service?: You can reach us via the live chat on our website or email us at support@bookstore.com.
Do you buy used books?: At this time, we only sell brand new books and do not have a buy-back program.
Can I change my shipping address after p: If your order has not shipped yet, please contact customer support immediately to update your address.
Do I need an account to place an order?: No, you can check out as a guest. However, creating an account allows you to track orders and save your wishlist.
How do I reset my account password?: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen, enter your email address, and we will send you a reset link.
Where is your physical store located?: We are a 100% online bookstore and do not have any physical retail locations.
What is your privacy policy?: We take your privacy seriously. We never sell your data to third parties. You can read our full privacy policy at the bottom of our homepage.
